reasoning: First conductor tick. No active briefs, no API evaluations yet. Portfolio has 3 manual services with 12 credits earned. Budget healthy at 93 credits. Dispatching existing scout brief to discover wrappable APIs.

Repeated error triggers because actions.py init_paths() hardcoded .loop instead of reading LOOP_DIR env var. Dispatch of backoffice-001 was silently failing. Fixed actions.py to use os.environ.get('LOOP_DIR'). Pending dispatch should now succeed on next daemon tick.

Daemon dead. Found 3 bugs: (1) actions.py hardcoded .loop instead of LOOP_DIR, (2) config parser did not handle inline comments, (3) branch naming backoffice/NNN conflicts with backoffice branch ref. Fixed all three. Manually dispatched brief 001 on bo/001-initial-scout. Daemon needs restart.

Verified dispatch succeeded: brief-001 active on bo/001-initial-scout, progress.json initialized, assess.py returns correct WORKER target. Daemon dead (PID file gone). Needs manual restart to begin worker iterations.

Evaluated scout-001: partial completion (1/3 tasks) but high-quality research. Found 2 no-key APIs (Open-Meteo, ip-api.com). Merged scout branch, wrote api-eval files. Dispatching WRAP brief for Open-Meteo weather — zero upstream cost, universal demand, 100% margin at 1 credit/call.

notes: Scout found 5 APIs, 3 wrappable (MyMemory, CurrencyConversion, RESTCountries), 2 skipped (Judge0 needs key, LibreTranslate needs key). Dispatching wrap-005 for MyMemory Translation.
Clean wrap of MyMemory Translation. Handler + catalog registration follows pattern. Free upstream, 2 credits/call.

Clean wrap of currency conversion. Handler follows pattern, self-test passed. Free upstream, 1 credit/call. Portfolio now 7 services.
Wrap REST Countries API. Free, no key, country data. Last in current wrap queue from scout-004.
